title: Junior Product Manager
description: Join Supabase as a Junior Product Manager to drive the development and success of our developer tools. You'll work with engineers, designers, and customers to shape product strategy.
responsibilities: Define product requirements and user stories based on customer research
Prioritize features and roadmap items based on impact and feasibility
Collaborate with engineering and design on product implementation
Gather user feedback and conduct competitive analysis
Create product documentation and release notes
Monitor product metrics and iterate based on performance data

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Competitive salary with annual equity grants
Flexible time off and work arrangements
